title: clibadium terebinthinaceum
intro: Clibadium terebinthinaceum, also known as Mayan chamomile or chamomile of the forest, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which contain sesquiterpenes and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Clibadium terebinthinaceum has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Clibadium terebinthinaceum include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
